Skip to contents
SCP 0.1.2
  • Reference

    Single-cell reference mapping with Seurat method

    RunSeuratMap.Rd

    Single-cell reference mapping with Seurat method

    Usage

    RunSeuratMap(
  srt_query,
  srt_ref,
  ref_pca = NULL,
  ref_dims = 1:30,
  ref_umap = NULL,
  force = FALSE,
  ref_group = NULL,
  normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
  reduction_project_method = "pcaproject",
  k.anchor = 5,
  k.filter = 200,
  k.score = 30,
  k.weight = 20,
  projection_method = "model",
  nn_method = NULL,
  k = 30,
  distance_metric = "cosine",
  vote_fun = "mean"
)

    Examples

    library(SeuratData)
#> Error in library(SeuratData): there is no package called ‘SeuratData’
library(stringr)
suppressWarnings(InstallData("panc8"))
#> Error in InstallData("panc8"): could not find function "InstallData"
data("panc8")
#> Warning: data set ‘panc8’ not found

# Simply convert genes from human to mouse and preprocess the data
genenm <- make.unique(str_to_title(rownames(panc8)))
#> Error in h(simpleError(msg, call)): error in evaluating the argument 'x' in selecting a method for function 'rownames': object 'panc8' not found
panc8 <- RenameFeatures(panc8, newnames = genenm)
#> Error in is(x, "classRepresentation"): object 'panc8' not found
head(rownames(panc8))
#> Error in h(simpleError(msg, call)): error in evaluating the argument 'x' in selecting a method for function 'head': error in evaluating the argument 'x' in selecting a method for function 'rownames': object 'panc8' not found

panc8 <- Integration_SCP(panc8, batch = "tech", integration_method = "Seurat")
#> Error in Integration_SCP(panc8, batch = "tech", integration_method = "Seurat"): object 'panc8' not found
ClassDimPlot(panc8, "celltype")
#> Error in ClassDimPlot(panc8, "celltype"): object 'panc8' not found

# Projection
pancreas1k <- Standard_SCP(pancreas1k)
#> [2022-06-14 04:14:30] Start Standard_SCP
#> [2022-06-14 04:14:30] Checking srtList... ...
#> Data 1/1 of the srtList is raw counts. Perform NormalizeData(logCPM) on the data ...
#> Perform FindVariableFeatures on the data 1/1 of the srtList...
#> Use the separate HVF from the existed HVF in srtList...
#> [2022-06-14 04:14:32] Finished checking.
#> Perform ScaleData on the data...
#> Perform linear dimension reduction (pca) on the data...
#> Perform FindClusters (louvain) on the data...
#> Reorder clusters...
#> Perform nonlinear dimension reduction (umap) on the data...
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> [2022-06-14 04:14:51] Standard_SCP done
#> Elapsed time: 21.06 secs 
pancreas1k <- RunSeuratMap(
  srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8,
  ref_group = "celltype", ref_pca = "Seuratpca", ref_umap = "SeuratUMAP2D"
)
#> Error in "model" %in% names(srt_ref[[ref_umap]]@misc): object 'panc8' not found
ProjectionPlot(srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8, query_group = "predicted_ref_group", ref_group = "celltype")
#> Error: Cannot find 'ref.umap' in this Seurat object
